hero.title: Activate. Earn. Play.
hero.subtitle: No endless tapping. Just press Activate, go about your day, and earn real Web3 tokens automatically. Invite friends, collect skins, and become part of the decentralized future — all inside Telegram.

goal.title: Simple Earnings Without Wasting Your Time
goal.description: We're tired of apps that make you tap the screen all day long just to earn a fraction of a cent. Dream Step is different — just hit Activate and tokens start accumulating automatically for 2 hours. You can activate up to 4 times a day. No grind, no wasted time — just passive income and a real Web3 experience.

tokenomics.title: Fair Tokenomics
tokenomics.description: We believe the community should receive the lion's share. That's why our emission model is built around fairness:

activate.title: Activate & Earn
activate.description: Press one button — and for the next 2 hours tokens are credited automatically every 2 seconds. Up to 4 sessions per day, plus bonuses.

friends.title: Invite Friends & Play Together
friends.description: Bring your friends and compete together. Earn bonus tokens for every invited user.

wheel.title: Spin the Fortune Wheel
wheel.description: Test your luck daily! Spin the wheel and win extra tokens, skins, or boosts.

level.title: Upgrade Your Level
level.description: The more active you are, the higher your level. Unlock exclusive rewards and multipliers.

bonuses.title: Buy Bonuses
bonuses.description: Purchase multipliers, shields, and special abilities using Telegram Stars or TON to earn even faster.

staking.title: Stake Your Tokens
staking.description: Lock your tokens and earn passive rewards. The longer you stake, the higher the return.

staking.title: Token Staking
staking.description: Don't let your tokens sit idle. Stake them inside the bot and earn additional rewards automatically. The longer the lock period, the higher the yield.

flexible.title: Flexible Periods
flexible.description: Choose a staking period that suits you — from 7 days to 365 days.

rewards.title: Daily Rewards
rewards.description: Rewards are credited daily to your balance, which you can reinvest.

secure.title: Secure & Transparent
secure.description: All staking operations are logged on-chain. Full transparency, no hidden fees.

skins.title: Available Skins
skins.description: Choose a unique character to accompany you during sessions. People, kids, and even pets — everyone earns tokens together!

disclaimerContent.title: Declaration of Intent and Disclaimer
disclaimerContent.section1Title: 1. Declaration of Intent and Ecosystem Development
disclaimerContent.section2Title: 2. Risk Disclosure and Limitation of Liability
disclaimerContent.section2:
The User hereby acknowledges that they are aware of the specifics and risks associated with the digital asset industry. Despite the Team's good-faith efforts to develop the project, the User accepts the following terms:

• No guarantee of profitability: The Developers expressly state the absence of any explicit or implied guarantees that the User will receive profit, income, dividends, or any other financial gain as a result of participating in the project or holding its digital assets.

• Pricing and listing: The Company does not set, control, or bear responsibility for the formation of the digital asset's price at the time of its initial listing on exchanges, nor for its subsequent dynamics. The market value of the asset is determined solely by independent open-market factors, including supply and demand, as well as the general cryptocurrency market conditions.

• Disclaimer of financial liability: Under no circumstances shall the Developers, founders, employees, or affiliated persons of the Company bear legal or financial responsibility for any direct, indirect, incidental, or punitive damages, including but not limited to: loss of capital, lost profits, or depreciation of assets.

• Investment status: Neither the product itself nor the accompanying informational materials constitute a securities prospectus, an investment offer, or a financial recommendation. All decisions regarding the acquisition, holding, or sale of digital assets are made by the User independently and at their own full personal responsibility.

The User confirms that they have read this notice, fully understand its content, and assume all economic and legal risks associated with interacting with the product.
